rows.label: qev091705_MSG0001
rows.name: I take it you're Lan'cord?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0002
rows.name: I am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0003
rows.name:
I assumed On'tonam and his opportunist
pals would show up and make me an offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm shocked to see they sent lesser
lifeforms like you humans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev091705_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Lan'cord why he didn't
join the rest of his kind.

rows.label: qev091705_JNK0020
rows.name: Thank

rows.label: qev091705_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that you owe him for the
water-purification plant.

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0005
rows.name: Because I was different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0006
rows.name:
Their Ovah urged them to betray
the Growth. Mine did not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0007
rows.name:
Instead, it judged those traitors'
deaths to be my highest priority.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0008
rows.name:
Did you grasp the overwhelming
difference in technology?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0009
rows.name:
My mind makes that of
On'tonam look like...yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0010
rows.name: Whatever. Don't care.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0011
rows.name:
You should come along quietly
so I can go collect my reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0012
rows.name:
So sorry, but I plan
to do no such thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0013
rows.name: The Orphe do not fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0014
rows.name:
Common knowledge, I realize.
Yet again, I am different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0015
rows.name:
It was not by chance that I
made it here alone. I am—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0016
rows.name: Talking. Too much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_JNK0030
rows.name: Stare

rows.label: qev091705_SEL0031
rows.name:
Stand in shocked amazement
at the Murderess's actions.

rows.label: qev091705_JNK0040
rows.name: Intervene

rows.label: qev091705_SEL0041
rows.name:
Remind the Murderess that
BLADE needs him alive.

rows.label: qev091705_JNK0050
rows.name: Argue

rows.label: qev091705_SEL0051
rows.name:
Say that you were hoping to
beat Lan'cord into submission.

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0017
rows.name: H-how barbaric![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0018
rows.name:
Did I cut your speech short? Sorry.
Mother always said I bored easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0019
rows.name:
But that's actually good for you, because
otherwise I might keep shooting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0020
rows.name: You uncivilized animal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0021
rows.name: Oh, I know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0022
rows.name:
Killing him kills my bounty. But
injuring him still gets me paid![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0023
rows.name: You uncivilized animal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0024
rows.name:
Easy, tiger. This avoids a fight.
It's more civilized and junk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0025
rows.name:
What part of this is
civilized, you animal?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey! I'll have you know I was
the daughter of a tycoon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0027
rows.name:
My childhood was all frilly dresses
and tea parties. I KNOW civilized![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0028
rows.name: Right then![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0029
rows.name:
Time to haul the Roach
Doctor here back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0030
rows.name: We've got 600 large waiting for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0031
rows.name:
Oh, dammit! I KNEW I should've beaten
the location of that data out of him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091705_MSG0032
rows.name:
Well, I guess we'll have to search for
it on our own. Home will have to wait.[ST:wait ]
